basics.name: M. Fahmi Rizki Syaban, MD, PhD (Cand.)
basics.label: Medical Doctor & Researcher
basics.summary: Doctoral researcher at the University of Miyazaki, Japan, focusing on protein structures and molecular dynamics. Medical doctor with clinical experience in Indonesia.

work.name: University of Miyazaki
work.summary: Research on FHOD1 protein autoinhibition and molecular biology.
